caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVELE DO SHIT" printed in white and orange is speaking into a professional microphone. He is situated in a room filled with framed pictures on the wall and a white mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. A clothing rack with various garments is also visible behind him. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular one on the left that says "THE" and another on the right that reads "RED VELVET TOY". As the scene progresses, the man continues to talk, his mouth opening and closing, while he begins to gesture with his right hand, moving it into the frame to emphasize his speech. The background and his attire remain constant throughout the sequence.
